auth.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters long
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 32 characters long
auth.passwordNoUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth.passwordNoLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
auth.passwordNoNumber: Password must contain at least one number
auth.passwordNoSpecialCharacter: Password must contain at least one special character
auth.fullNameTooShort: Full name must be at least 2 characters long
auth.fullNameTooLong: Full name must be at most 50 characters long

login.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Please check your inbox for the verification email.
login.auth.login.userInactive: User account is inactive. Please contact support.
login.auth.login.userSuspended: User account is banned. Please contact support.
login.auth.login.userUnavailable: User account is unavailable. Please contact support.

forgotPassword.success: If an account with this email exists, a password reset email has been sent.

resetPassword.samePassword: New password must be different from the current password.

request.manyRequests: Too many requests, please try again later
